title: Gyro Wrap
description: A classic Greek-inspired wrap filled with juicy chicken and crispy lotus leaf.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt, pepper, and your favorite spices.
Wrap the chicken breast in a lotus leaf and place it in the oven.
Cook for 20-25 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Meanwhile, warm the gyro wrap in the oven for 5-7 minutes.
In a bowl, mix together the Greek yogurt, chopped cucumber, and chopped red onion.
Remove the chicken from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Slice the chicken into thin strips and add it to the bowl with the yogurt mixture.
Assemble the gyro wrap by placing the chicken mixture on the warmed wrap.
Add any additional toppings you like, such as tomato, lettuce, or feta cheese.
